latest_entries.title: Add worklog validation and summary rollups
latest_entries.summary: Make the AI worklog skill more reliable for other users and cheaper for future agents to read

latest_entries.title: Add project config and legacy migration to AI worklog skill
latest_entries.summary: Make the skill easier for teams to configure and migrate older worklogs into project-scoped storage

latest_entries.title: Fix GitHub Actions git identity failure
latest_entries.summary: Make publish_worklog.py work in CI and fresh environments without global git user configuration

latest_entries.title: Harden AI worklog publishing and bootstrap
latest_entries.summary: Improve security stability engineering maintainability and bootstrap performance for the AI worklog skill

decisions.title: Add worklog validation and summary rollups
decisions.text: Publish should validate structured worklog records and update compact weekly/monthly summaries before pushing, so remote logs stay machine-readable by default.

decisions.title: Add project config and legacy migration to AI worklog skill
decisions.text: Use .ai-worklog.json as intentional project configuration so users do not need to repeat project and remote arguments on every command.

decisions.title: Fix GitHub Actions git identity failure
decisions.text: Set git user.name and user.email locally inside temporary publishing repositories so CI and first-time users do not need global git identity configuration.

decisions.title: Harden AI worklog publishing and bootstrap
decisions.text: Use YAML frontmatter plus ai-index/<project>.json to make records both human-readable and machine-efficient for future Codex bootstrap.

pitfalls.title: Add worklog validation and summary rollups
pitfalls.text: Future agents waste context if bootstrap only reads raw monthly logs; read ai-index and ai-summary before detailed entries.

pitfalls.title: Add project config and legacy migration to AI worklog skill
pitfalls.text: Changing storage layouts without a migration path leaves older logs hard to retrieve; keep migration additive and non-destructive.

pitfalls.title: Fix GitHub Actions git identity failure
pitfalls.text: GitHub Actions runners may not have git author identity, causing git commit to fail even when worklog generation and scanning succeed.

pitfalls.title: Harden AI worklog publishing and bootstrap
pitfalls.text: Regex-only Markdown parsing is fragile over time; stable ids and compact indexes reduce parsing ambiguity and token use.
